title: When Crude Oil Futures Are Not Driven By Crude Oil Fundamentals
section_path: When Crude Oil Futures Are Not Driven By Crude Oil Fundamentals
section_path_text: When Crude Oil Futures Are Not Driven By Crude Oil Fundamentals
summary:
We try to shed some light into the recent selloff in crude oil at a time of rising geopolitical risks. Ample seaborne product supplies play a crucial role. By David Wech
With a fresh war in the Middle East, crude oil futures are on a roller-coaster ride.

children.title: We try to shed some light into the recent selloff in crude oil at a time of rising geopolitical risks. Ample seaborne product supplies play a crucial role.
section_path: We try to shed some light into the recent selloff in crude oil at a time of rising geopolitical risks. Ample seaborne product supplies play a crucial role.
children.section_path_text: We try to shed some light into the recent selloff in crude oil at a time of rising geopolitical risks. Ample seaborne product supplies play a crucial role.
children.summary:
By David Wech
With a fresh war in the Middle East, crude oil futures are on a roller-coaster ride. But except for a marginal $2/b post-war increase, the story is actually that oil prices have retreated markedly after the failed quest for the $100/b threshold.
